title: rubus costaricanus
intro: Rubus costaricanus, also known as the Costa Rican raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Costa Rica and other parts of Central America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus costaricanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent, among others. Rubus costaricanus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
